title: Febreze Air Freshener Spray FRUITY TROPICS 185ml x 4 | Odour Eliminator with OdourClear Technology | Non-Flammable, Long-Lasting Room Freshener, Exotic Fruity Fragrance
features: 🧴 4 x 185ml Fruity Tropics Air Mists – Refresh your home with a vibrant tropical fruit scent in a handy multi-pack
💨 OdourClear Technology – Doesn’t mask odours; actively eliminates them for a fresh, clean feel
🍍 Exotic & Uplifting Fragrance – Inspired by tropical fruits for a burst of sweet, juicy freshness
🔥 Propellant-Free & Non-Flammable – Safe for use around the home, including kitchens and bathrooms
🇬🇧 Made in the UK – Trusted Febreze quality, suitable for homes with pets, kids, or sensitive noses
🏠 Versatile Room Use – Ideal for living rooms, kitchens, bathrooms, hallways, and more
description: Bring a touch of the tropics into your home with this Febreze Air Mist Fruity Tropics Spray bundle, featuring 4 x 185ml air fresheners designed to eliminate odours and leave a lasting exotic fruit fragrance. With OdourClear Technology , Febreze doesn't just mask smells – it eliminates them at the source. The bright, juicy scent of tropical fruits instantly revitalises your space, making every room feel clean, cheerful, and inviting. Includes 4 x 185ml Fruity Tropics sprays Eliminates cooking, pet, and musty odours Sweet and vibrant tropical fruit scent Non-flammable and propellant-free formula Perfect for everyday use throughout your home Febreze – breathe in freshness, breathe out the tropics.
